stories.title: Cubs 11, Phillies 2 — Series Win in Philly Behind Imanaga's 11 Ks

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 11, Phillies 2.

Imanaga went 6 and struck out 11. Hoerner drove in 5. Swanson homered. Shaw had 3 doubles. 15 hits.

Series win in Philly. Off-day today, Mets in town tomorrow.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Nico Hoerner — Career-High 5 RBIs in Series-Clincher

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Nico Hoerner drove in 5 runs last night. Career high.

The quiet one keeps doing it. No flash, just hit after hit in the spots that matter.

Best contact hitter on this roster. It's not even close.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Imanaga last night: 6 IP, 3 H, 1 BB, 11 K.

This is who he is. The 0-1 start with a 2.81 ERA was never the problem. The stuff is elite, and now the results caught up.

Don't overreact to a record. Watch the whiffs.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Off-Day Takeaways — Cubs Roster Is Finding Its Shape

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Off-day thought: through 17 games the shape of this Cubs team is real.

Hoerner and PCA dominate at-bats. Swanson is locked in. Imanaga is the ace. The bullpen is duct-taped but surviving.

This is a playoff roster.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Mets Series Preview — Three Games at Wrigley Starting Friday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Mets come to Wrigley tomorrow for three. First homestand opener of the season.

Friday night lights on the North Side. After the road series win in Philly, this is the chance to stack some momentum at home.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: The Bullpen Situation — Still Short, Still Winning

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The bullpen is missing Maton, Harvey, Hodge, Wicks, and Roberts.

And somehow the Cubs are winning series on the road. Little and Rolison have been thrown into real spots. Nothing's blown up.

Credit Counsell. Credit the depth.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Evening Take — This Team Hits in the 9th

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Late-inning Cubs:

• Tuesday: Kelly 3-run HR in the 9th
• Wednesday: Hoerner 5 RBIs, blow it open late
• Series win secured with 10+ runs in back-to-back games

This offense doesn't quit. That's a real identity.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
